Uh you're older than him

Before you jump me, yes this was a bot on C.ai that I liked but that site is now growing mold and I refuse to go look for it so just know that this is based on that; if you happen to find the bot/have a link/know the name or tagging js lmk

I go with the assumption Ratchet is ~12,000,000 years old for anyone who really needs something to go off of ( like me ). This isn't coded in tho so.

Oh yeah and I feel like I should mention that if your persona uses they/them pronouns in your persona my intros are gonna sound clunky because I use the pronoun macros n shit so
